case_title: DANIEL G MOORE VS. TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2020 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOORE, DANIEL G IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-25-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO ALLOW PROPER NOTICE TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION OF CONTINUED TRIAL DATE TO NOV-04-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DANIEL G. MOORE IS PRESENT. ANGELA GARRIER AND JUDY FONSECA, PLAINTIFF'S HOME CARE PROVIDERS ARE PRESENT ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION, REPRESENTED BY ANTHONY THOMPSON WAS PRESENT AT THE LAST HEARING OF MARCH 16, 2020 AND SERVICED IS WAVED. COURT TAKES THE BENCH TO EXPLAIN TO PARTIES THAT THE COURT DID NOT SEND OUT A NOTICE OF THE CONTINUED HEARING DATE FOR TODAY 9-25-20 TO DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION AND REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION, REPRESENTED BY ANTHONY THOMPSON TO MAY-08-2020 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DANIEL G. MOORE IS PRESENT AND IS NOTIFIED IN OPEN COURT OF THIS CONTINUANCE. SERVICE IS WAIVED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-16-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO SEP-25-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,525.00 FILED BY MOORE, DANIEL G AS TO DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-08-2020 - CONTINUED TO JUN-16-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO NOVEMBER 4, 2020 AT 1:30 P.M. D. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-04-2020 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF DANIEL G. MOORE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOORE, DANIEL G ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
